mapper.select: select mar_goods.id goods_id,mar_goods.goods_name,mar_goods.number goods_number,mar_goods.goods_status status, mar_submit.create_time from mar_submit left join mar_goods on mar_submit.goods_id=mar_goods.id where mar_submit.user_id=#{userId};
select count(*) from mar_submit where user_id=#{userId} and goods_id=#{goodsId}
